name: Martha Washington Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Add half of the sugar and half of the buttermilk to the melted chocolate. Stir until well blended.
3. Cool mixture thoroughly.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Cream the butter in another bowl until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually beat in the remaining sugar until combined.
7. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
8. Blend in about a quarter of the dry mixture, then add the chocolate and vanilla.
9. Alternately add the remaining dry mixture and buttermilk, beating after each addition until smooth.
10. Pour batter into two greased and floured 9-inch cake pans.
11. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes.
12. Frost with cream cheese frosting on top and between layers using the chocolate frosting recipe from a Hershey's cocoa box.
